Let's Talk

Skills&Tools

A showcase of my frequently used skills, frameworks, databases, and design tools across different stacks.

Frontend Development

Building responsive and dynamic user interfaces.

JavaScript

Core language for web interactivity. Used extensively across all projects.

TypeScript

My primary language. Used in QLSV Admin, Microservices for type-safe code.

ReactJS

Base library for UI. Used alongside Next.js for SSR and performance optimization.

HTML & CSS

The foundational building blocks. I write semantic HTML and modular CSS.

TailwindCSS

My go-to styling framework. Used to quickly build premium UIs like this portfolio.

Backend & Database

Architecting robust APIs, services, and handling data.

C#/.NET

Familiar with ASP.NET Core for building enterprise-level REST APIs.

Java

Learned at university, capable of building OOP-based system logic.

ASP.NET MVC

Used for building monolithic web applications during coursework.

Entity Framework

Primary ORM used alongside C# for executing database queries securely.

SQL Server

Experience writing complex relational queries and stored procedures.

MySQL

Lightweight relational DB used in quick MVPs and personal deployments.

Development Tools

Version control, IDEs, and API testing platforms.

Git & GitHub

Proficient with branching, PRs, and team collaboration workflows.

VS Code

My preferred lightweight editor for all JavaScript/TypeScript work.

Visual Studio

Used for comprehensive C# and .NET enterprise development.

Postman

Crucial for documenting, designing, and testing RESTful APIs.

DBDiagram

Visual tool for architecting and sharing complex database schemas.

Design & Creative

Creating wireframes, mockups, and visual assets.

Photoshop

Image editing, manipulation, and preparing assets for the web.

Illustrator

Vector graphics creation, used for scalable logos and clean SVGs.

Figma

My main tool for UI/UX wireframing, prototyping, and design handoff.

Canva

Rapid creation of social media posts, banners, and quick presentations.

minhdev

Frontend Developer Intern based in Hai Bà Trưng, Hà Nội, Việt Nam. Building clean, modern UI with solid UX.
